title: rumex acetosella var. vulgaris
intro: Rumex acetosella var. vulgaris, also known as the common sorrel or garden sorrel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its high levels of vitamins A and C, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rumex acetosella var. vulgaris include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Rumex acetosella var. vulgaris can be prepared as an herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is also used in cooking as a flavorful addition to salads and other dishes.
